name: CTO Realty Growth Inc. 6.375% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: CTO Realty Growth Inc. 6.375% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents ownership in preferred shares of CTO Realty Growth Inc. CTO Realty Growth is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a portfolio of high-quality, income-producing properties. The preferred stock offers a fixed dividend payment.
